pricing.name: AC Tune-Up
pricing.best_for: Annual maintenance to keep your system running efficiently.
highlights: Catches small issues before they become big ones

pricing.name: Diagnostic Visit
pricing.best_for: When your system isn't cooling right and you need to know why.

pricing.name: Emergency Call
pricing.best_for: No AC, no heat, or any urgent system failure.
